opportunity.title: Show HN: Trustless Campaigns – Gecko transforms brand-creator deals
opportunity.summary: Gecko turns brand-creator deals into self-enforcing contracts — budget locked before the campaign starts, creators paid automatically when delivery is verified. Every brand-creator deal runs on trust. Brand pays after the creator posts. Creator posts before payment is locked. A *$21 billion industry on Telegram DMs and email threads* — when it breaks, there's no enforcement. Just a conversation that goes nowhere. Gecko fixes that at the contract level.
